name: OSTEOFIBROUS DYSPLASIA
definition: entity previously mistaken for fibrous dysplasia

demographics.Histo: fibrous tissue surrounding trabeculae in a whorled storiform pattern
demographics.Location: normally confined to tibia (middiaphysis in 50%), lesion begins in anterior cortex;

dominant_finding: enlargement of tibia with anterior bowing
distribution: normally confined to tibia (middiaphysis in 50%), lesion begins in anterior cortex;
discriminating_features: enlargement of tibia with anterior bowing
sclerotic margin (DDx: nonosteogenic fibroma, chondromyxoid fibroma)

general: enlargement of tibia with anterior bowing
sclerotic margin (DDx: nonosteogenic fibroma, chondromyxoid fibroma)

clinical.Cx: pathologic fracture in 25%, fractures will heal with immobilization; infrequently
